title: Pacaltsdorp United thrashes George
description: CRICKET NEWS - A hat-trick by Matthew Thorne...
bodyText: [{"type":"intro_bold","text":"Pacaltsdorp United has now moved to the second position on the log."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"CRICKET NEWS - A hat-trick by Matthew Thorne (5/19) was the highlight in the only SWD Premier League match that was played last weekend.","html":"CRICKET NEWS - A hat-trick by Matthew Thorne (5/19) was the highlight in the only SWD Premier League match that was played last weekend."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"George was dismissed for a record low score of 90, whereafter Pacaltsdorp only needed 7.3 overs to surpass the target for a nine-wicket victory."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Duren Felix (4/20) was equally impressive with the ball.","html":"Duren Felix (4/20) was equally impressive with the ball."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United has now moved to the second position on the log.","html":"Pacaltsdorp United has now moved to the second position on the log."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The scorecard:","html":"The scorecard:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United beats George by nine wickets:","html":"Pacaltsdorp United beats George by nine wickets:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"George 40 all out (12.5 overs) (Matthew Thorne 5/19, Duren Felix 4/20).","html":"George 40 all out (12.5 overs) (Matthew Thorne 5/19, Duren Felix 4/20)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Pacaltsdorp United 44/1 (7.3 overs) (Kurt Botha 21*, Anoxolo Kitshini 19).","html":"Pacaltsdorp United 44/1 (7.3 overs) (Kurt Botha 21*, Anoxolo Kitshini 19)."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The log positions are:","html":"The log positions are:"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"1st: Sussex - 34 points (9 matches)","html":"1st: Sussex - 34 points (9 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"2nd: Pacaltsdorp United - 32 points (8 matches)","html":"2nd: Pacaltsdorp United - 32 points (8 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"3rd: Knysna Cavaliers - 26 points (9 matches)","html":"3rd: Knysna Cavaliers - 26 points (9 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"4th: Union Stars I - 20 points (9 matches)","html":"4th: Union Stars I - 20 points (9 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"5th: Harlequins Forces - 15 points (7 matches)","html":"5th: Harlequins Forces - 15 points (7 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"6th: George - 13 points (9 matches)","html":"6th: George - 13 points (9 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"7th: Union Stars II - 12 points (9 matches)","html":"7th: Union Stars II - 12 points (9 matches)"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"8th: New Dawn Park - 6 points (8 matches).","html":"8th: New Dawn Park - 6 points (8 matches)."}]

teaser: Pacaltsdorp United has now moved to the second position on the log.
featuredCaption: Matthew Thorne’s hat-trick was a highlight. Photo: SWD Cricket
